label: Spring Boot
description: Opinionated Spring framework for production apps.

phases.label: Spring Boot Basics
phases.description: Project setup, auto-configuration, and REST controllers.

topics.label: Spring Initializr
topics.description: Generate projects at start.spring.io. Understand starters and dependencies.

topics.label: Auto-Configuration
topics.description: Spring Boot auto-configures beans based on classpath. application.properties/yml.

topics.label: application.properties
topics.description: Configure database, server port, logging, and profiles (dev/prod).

topics.label: Actuator
topics.description: Health checks, metrics, and monitoring endpoints for production.

phases.label: Data & Security
phases.description: Spring Data JPA, validation, and Spring Security.

topics.label: Spring Data JPA
topics.description: @Entity, JpaRepository, derived queries, @Query. Database access without boilerplate.

topics.label: Spring Security
topics.description: Authentication, authorization, filters, and security configuration.

topics.label: JWT Authentication
topics.description: Stateless auth with JSON Web Tokens. Token generation and validation.

topics.label: Flyway/Liquibase
topics.description: Database migration tools integrated with Spring Boot.

topics.label: @SpringBootTest
topics.description: Integration testing with full application context.

topics.label: @WebMvcTest
topics.description: Controller layer testing with MockMvc. Slice tests.

topics.label: @DataJpaTest
topics.description: Repository layer testing with embedded database.

topics.label: Testcontainers
topics.description: Integration testing with real databases via Docker containers.

topics.label: Docker & CI/CD
topics.description: Build Docker images with Spring Boot's built-in Buildpacks or Dockerfile.

topics.label: Profiles & Configuration
topics.description: Spring profiles (dev, staging, prod) and externalized configuration.
